text.title: Project Closure Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing how the project-closure methodology converts inputs into a valid `spec` artefact. Trace mirrors the decision-tree example in `06-decision-tree.xml`.

example.setting: A representative case satisfying all `Applies If` preconditions.
example.trace: preconditions=true → acceptance_signed=true → lessons_captured=true → handover_signed=true → archived → closed.
